_comment: Example normalized task record: orbit_micro_default, tc_01
_status: proposed (Phase 4, batch 2) — illustrative, not from real API call
_note: Task record captures the API-layer lifecycle for a single run. In V1, this data is embedded in the run record (api_* and output sections). This file demonstrates the normalized shape only.

_provider_raw_on_submit._note: Raw provider response at task creation (task creation response)

_provider_raw_on_complete._note: Raw provider response at terminal state (received via callback payload)

_v1_notes.result_source: callback — preferred for production. polling used for dev/manual workflow.
_v1_notes.task_record_in_v1: In V1, these fields are embedded in the run record (api_* section + output section). A separate .task-record.json file is an illustrative example artifact only.
_v1_notes.video_url_ttl: TTL of CDN video_url is unknown — verify with Kie AI. Download video promptly after success.
